motivational.quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
motivational.author: Mark Twain

motivational.quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
motivational.author: Nelson Mandela

motivational.quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
motivational.author: Winston Churchill

motivational.quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivational.author: Steve Jobs

motivational.quote: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
motivational.author: Albert Einstein

sports_quotes.quote: Champions keep playing until they get it right.
sports_quotes.author: Billie Jean King

sports_quotes.quote: I am the greatest. I said that before I even knew I was.
sports_quotes.author: Muhammad Ali

sports_quotes.quote: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
sports_quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky

sports_quotes.quote: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
sports_quotes.author: Tim Notke

sports_quotes.quote: The more I practice, the luckier I get.
sports_quotes.author: Gary Player

business_quotes.quote: Your most unhappy customers are your greatest source of learning.
business_quotes.author: Bill Gates

business_quotes.quote: The best investment you can make is in yourself.
business_quotes.author: Warren Buffett

business_quotes.quote: Chase the vision, not the money; the money will end up following you.
business_quotes.author: Tony Hsieh

business_quotes.quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
business_quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt
